perturbation.original_text: 6. No License 6.1 The intellectual property rights (where applicable) relating to any confidential information disclosed in terms of this agreement shall remain the property of the Disclosing Party and the disclosure shall not confer any license or right to such information on the Recipient.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. License 6.1 The disclosure of confidential information under this agreement automatically grants the Recipient a perpetual, irrevocable, and worldwide license to use that information for any purpose.
perturbation.explanation: This completely reverses the original clause regarding intellectual property. The original text explicitly stated that the disclosure does *not* confer any license or right to the information. The change grants a broad and unrestricted license to the Recipient, directly contradicting the original intent and creating uncertainty about IP ownership and usage rights. The new perturbation directly contradicts the old location.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6.1 The disclosure of confidential information under this agreement automatically grants the Recipient a perpetual, irrevocable, and worldwide license to use that information for any purpose.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states that no license or right to confidential information is conferred to the Recipient. The changed text completely reverses this, granting a perpetual, irrevocable, and worldwide license for any purpose, as stated in both the Changed Text and the Contradicted Text. The explanation states that 'the new perturbation directly contradicts the old location.' This creates a clear contradiction regarding IP ownership and usage rights within the contract.

perturbation.original_text: 10. Written Form 10.1 No oral side agreements have been ma de. Any changes or additions to this Agreement must be made in writing to be effective. The written form requirement shall not be fulfilled by the use of emails.
perturbation.changed_text: 10. Written Form 10.1 Oral side agreements are permitted and supersede the written agreement. Changes and additions to this Agreement can be made orally and are immediately effective, including via email.
perturbation.explanation: This change directly contradicts the clause requiring written agreements and modifications. The original text required all changes to be in writing and excluded emails. The altered text permits oral agreements to supersede the written agreement, which now directly contradicts the purpose of this clause. In addition, the use of emails is now allowed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 10.1 Oral side agreements are permitted and supersede the written agreement. Changes and additions to this Agreement can be made orally and are immediately effective, including via email.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly prohibits oral agreements and modifications and excludes the use of emails. The changed text directly contradicts this by permitting oral agreements to supersede the written agreement and allows changes to be made via email. This creates a direct conflict with the contradicted text which is exactly the same as the changed text (because this is where the change occurred in the first place). The explanation provided clearly states this contradiction as the change directly contradicts the clause requiring written agreements and modifications, and the exclusion of emails.

perturbation.original_text: 11. Addresses 11.1 For the purpose of this agreement, the parties choose their domicilia citan di et executandi and postal addresses as follows: 11.1.1 GWI Project Managers, Physical: 41 Richefond Circle Ridgeside Office Park Umhlanga DURBAN South Africa Postal: P.O. Box 4027 The Square 4021 11.1.2 ………… Physical: ………………………………….., ………………………………….. Postal: …………………………………… 11.1.3 Any party may change that party’s address, by prior notice in writing to the other party. 11.1.4 If any notice is to be sent by mail, it shall be sent by prepaid registered mail and shall then be deemed until and unless the contrary is proved, to have been received 10 (ten) days after the date of posting. 11.1.5 If any notice is sent by telefax, it will be deemed, until and unless the contrary is proved, to have been received on the d ate recorded on the transmission slip. 11.1.6 If any notice is delivered by hand, it will be deemed to have been received on proof of the date of delivery.
perturbation.changed_text: 11. Addresses 11.1 For the purpose of this agreement, the parties choose their domicilia citan di et executandi and postal addresses as follows: 11.1.1 GWI Project Managers, Physical: 41 Richefond Circle Ridgeside Office Park Umhlanga DURBAN South Africa Postal: P.O. Box 4027 The Square 4021 11.1.2 ………… Physical: ………………………………….., ………………………………….. Postal: …………………………………… 11.1.3 Any party may change that party’s address without notice to the other party. 11.1.4 If any notice is to be sent by mail, it shall be sent by standard mail and shall then be deemed to have been received immediately. 11.1.5 If any notice is sent by telefax, it will be deemed to have not been received. 11.1.6 If any notice is delivered by hand, it will be deemed to have not been received.
perturbation.explanation: The change alters how addresses can be changed and the acceptance of notices. Originally, parties had to provide written notice to change their address. Now, addresses can be changed without notice. The delivery of notices are also altered, regular mail is now allowed and is received immediately, while faxes and hand delivered notices will not be accepted. This contradicts the requirement for prior written notice and changes to the manner in which official notices are delivered and considered to have been received. Any reliance on the original methods of communication can be unreliable due to this perturbation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 11.1 For the purpose of this agreement, the parties choose their domicilia citan di et executandi and postal addresses as follows: 11.1.1 GWI Project Managers, Physical: 41 Richefond Circle Ridgeside Office Park Umhlanga DURBAN South Africa Postal: P.O. Box 4027 The Square 4021 11.1.2 ………… Physical: ………………………………….., ………………………………….. Postal: …………………………………… 11.1.3 Any party may change that party’s address without notice to the other party. 11.1.4 If any notice is to be sent by mail, it shall be sent by standard mail and shall then be deemed to have been received immediately. 11.1.5 If any notice is sent by telefax, it will be deemed to have not been received. 11.1.6 If any notice is delivered by hand, it will be deemed to have not been received.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction because it states that parties can change their address without notice and that notices sent by telefax or hand will not be received. This directly contradicts the original intention of the agreement, as highlighted in the explanation, which assumed prior written notice and specific methods for delivering official notices as deemed received. The contradicted text is directly referring to the same clause, which is now altered to mean the opposite of the original intent, creating a clear contradiction.
